programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The hunters trace heirs to a £500,000 fortune and uncover the story of a Burlesque dancer who performed at Soho's famous Windmill club throughout WWII. Meanwhile, another case uncovers a families' links to one comic genius' radio career.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The boys head to Birmingham, where Henry Cole stumbles upon a model metal tipper truck, which he is convinced will make some money.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dan and Mardi Leonard welcome the others to their Brighton B&B, Guest and the City. The guests have mixed reactions to the contemporary décor and stained glass windows. Alan and Jane think the room isn't user friendly, Dubliner Phil is confused by the furniture, whilst Sarah and Jean-Pierre decry the lack of a shower curtain.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Phil Kiernan, entrepreneur and proud owner of the Farmer's Boy Inn in Gloucestershire welcomes his guests and quickly introduces them to his latest business venture: pies. Alan and Jane take centre stage in a pie-making competition as their kitchen bickering entertains the group. Before breakfast the next morning the group work up an appetite on the bouncy castle.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alan and Jane welcome their first ever guests to their brand-new purpose built hotel boat, the Geanna. On arrival the guests enjoy the novelty factor, but Dan and Mardi think that space is too tight, while Jean-Pierre and Sarah are concerned about privacy. After inspecting their cabins, the Geanna embarks on her maiden voyage up the Thames.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Connoisseurs Sarah Langford and Jean-Pierre Kujawa have been running Sentry Mead, their 11-bedroom, five-star silver B&B for the past six years. Their guests arrive with high expectations, but Jane's high hopes are dashed by the mugs, Dan and Mardi don't like their shower mat, and Phil's not keen on the towels.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day and the B&B hosts gather for one last time to find out how much they've been paid. Unfortunately, some of the hosts find their emotions running away with them.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swansea, performing arts director Anthony plans a theatre-themed menu for his guests, Ross, Tula, Kola and Julie. But straight-talking Tula tries to steal the show with a candid revelation.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swansea, salesman Ross plans a night of culinary sophistication to wow his guests, who he thinks lack class. But will his plan to cook everything to his taste, including a very rare beef Wellington, backfire?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Social carer Kola plans to bring some high-class hip-hop swagger to the contest in Swansea. He rolls out a red carpet welcome for his guests and hopes that his Nigerian menu will educate and impress them.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Triathlete Tula brings a taste of the Costa Brava to Swansea, with a Spanish-themed menu and dress code. She hopes that a combination of charm and chorizo can help her avoid a punch up over the paella.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Social worker Julie plans a chilled out slumber party for the final night of the week in Swansea. Julie cooks a homely menu, but struggles with the pronunciation as well as the preparation of some of her ingredients, which doesn't surprise Anthony.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit is to Bowlees Farm Holiday Cottages in County Durham, run by Tony and Viv Smith. Their guests love the views and facilities, including a tranquil setting, private hot tubs, and indoor swimming pool.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to The Piebald Inn in Hunmanby, North Yorkshire, run by John Allan and Leslie Moore. During a visit to a model village, the guests find out how the hosts met.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Stoneleigh House Boutique Hotel in Buckingham, run by friends Jane Parslow and Rachel Rawding. Having paid and displayed, they get the keys to their rooms where first impressions are mixed.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Evenlode Grounds in the Cotswolds, owned by Howard and Amanda Wooliams. Everyone is glad to be glamping but the feedback leads to questions come payday.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&Bers meet for the last time. After dramatic discoveries and cutting comments, the payments are made and the winner is announced.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil visit Essex and Hertfordshire. Kirstie is house hunting for Justin and Christie, who have spent the first five years of their relationship living 50 miles apart and are desperate to finally live together and start a family.

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce hosts the Grand Final, as our music maestros are put to the ultimate test. Who will reign supreme and be crowned PopMaster TV Champion 2025?

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Shop: A Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: A small town in the Yorkshire Dales rolls up its sleeves as it bids to restore a derelict Victorian grocer's and put some life back into its high street.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Harriet is rushed to St George's when the 13-year-old is knocked off her bike. Twelve-year-old Adam has a deep wound in his groin after falling from a tree and impaling his leg.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 63-year-old builder has fallen from a height. While his daughter tells of her dad's many sacrifices, a teenager who's been hit by a car arrives with possible brain injuries.

programme.desc: The West Midlands is hit by the worst snowstorm in years. Crews battle the elements to treat a woman semi-conscious in police custody and to attend a suspected miscarriage but on their way to hospital they get stuck in snow.

programme.desc: For four seasons fans of `Teen Mom' watched Farrah, Maci, Amber and Catelynn face multiple challenges in their first years of motherhood, including such things as graduating from high school, relationships, getting jobs, beginning college and moving out on their own. Oh, and raising their first child. Now the original girls - hence, the `OG' in the revived series title - return to reveal the challenges of raising children on camera, and how life in the public eye has shaped them as parents and people. It's an unprecedented view of young mothers facing the responsibilities of parenthood as their children enter kindergarten, start little league and reach other milestones of youth.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.desc: McSquizzy's city cousin Roger visits Camp Wild in 'Uptown Squirrel', then in 'Mother Nature's Fawn aka Coyotal Eclipse of the Fawn', Boog shows Elliots an old calendar.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.desc: Boog and Elliot fall in with a cool group of possums who turn out to be camp-robbers and must then figure out how to get all their friend's stolen belongings back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Patrick discovers the pineapple's library, SpongeBob introduces him to the wonderful world of book learning. Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while and that's making Mr Krabs nervous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Call the Cops; Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help. Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence. SpongeBob and Mr Krabs plot to get it back.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When Alvin makes fun of Simon's magic act, Simon challenges him to a magic duel. Alvin reluctantly signs up to teach the after school music class, but finds his classmates treat him differently as a teacher.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Theodore is stuck taking care of Miss Croner's cats during a week that Dave wants the boys to focus only on school. The Chipettes challenge the Chipmunks to go three hours without their favourite things.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV, but will SpongeBob make it home in time to watch? Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy invites Karen and Mrs Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam. Sandy is visited by her three nieces, but SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.desc: The campers go on a big journey to find a needed object and stumble across a mythical creature. A mysterious stranger arrives at the camp and seeks refuge.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.sub-title: Welcome to Camp Wild; A Break From the Norm
programme.desc: Elliot and Boog stumble upon an abandoned human summer camp, but their plans on keeping it a secret are put on hold when they meet Kiki. The campers must choose between their prejudices or their better nature.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Theodore is stuck taking care of Miss Croner's cats during a week that Dave wants the boys to focus only on school. The Chipettes challenge the Chipmunks to go three hours without their favourite things.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When Alvin is accused of revealing spoilers for everyone's favourite TV show, he agrees not to speak for 24 hours. When Alvin and Simon think Theodore's pet goldfish has died, they go all out to replace it before he notices.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Plankton solve a mystery on a runaway train.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick dig a tunnel between their houses; Patrick wreaks havoc in Bikini Bottom when he learns karate.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
programme.desc: Boog gets taken hostage by the spoiled and entitled pets of the high security Pet Palace. Now the campers have to work together so they can break their buddy out.

programme.title: Open Season: Call of Nature

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.sub-title: Islands of the Forth: Fortress Islands of the Forth
programme.desc: Paul Murton explores the Firth of Forth and discovers that the seemingly peaceful islands have a dramatic history of war; from English raids on the monastic island retreat of Inchcolm, to the first air-raid attack on Britain above Inchgarvie.

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The team find out how the railways transformed the British diet, rescuing a nation that was struggling to feed itself. Putting theory into practice Alex and Peter load a flock of sheep onto a train, discovering how the mass transportation of livestock by rail transformed the quality and quantity of meat available to Victorian consumers. This new capability gave birth to the traditional British roast.

programme.desc: New evidence rewrites the Great Wall of China's history, decodes its complex signals system and reveals the surprise ingredient that's kept it standing.

programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans an experience; Beck performs his hits including "Loser," "Wave," "Debra" and many more.

programme.title: The Moody Blues - Days of Future Passed Live
programme.desc: Celebrating the 50th anniversary of their landmark album, Days of Future Passed, The Moody Blues took to the road to perform the entire LP live. An electric evening at The Sony Centre, Toronto, where the band was joined on stage by a full orchestra for the first time ever, is the definitive performance of this seminal album.

programme.title: Hall & Oates - Live at The Sydney Entertainment Centre
programme.desc: Daryl Hall and John Oates wisely reunited a few years ago after a string of solo projects, & they put on the kind of show that makes it hard to believe they even considered going their separate ways. Here they are at the Sydney Entertainment Centre.

programme.title: Coldplay - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Willie Nelson: Live at iTunes Festival
programme.desc: American country singer and guitarist Willie Nelson performs his top tracks at the 2014 iTunes Festival.

programme.title: Duane Allman - Song of the South
programme.desc: Duane Allman, the lead guitarist and driving force behind Southern Rock pioneers The Allman Brothers Band, lived a tragically short life, but during his brief career he changed music forever.

programme.title: Guns N' Roses: Live From The O2 Arena London
programme.desc: Watching this mega-production of Guns N' Roses performing live at the O2 Arena to its fans singing and vibrating to each song including Paradise City, Sweet Child O' Mine, November Rain and many more.

programme.title: Elton John - Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Filmed at the Roundhouse in London, this concert film gives fans a live experience from start to finish; Elton John performs his hits: "Tiny Dancer," "Rocket Man," "Your Song," and many more.

programme.title: Lady Gaga -- Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Lady Gaga's performance at the iTunes Festival in London on Sept. 1, 2013 marks her first full concert since the Born This Way Ball.

programme.title: Seal - Live at Soundstage
programme.desc: Seal's one-of-a-kind soaring, husky baritone voice is perfect for any genre; he's delighted fans and earned critical acclaim while staying true to classic, honest songwriting in his remarkable two-decade career.

programme.title: Rod Stewart Live From Nokia Time Square, New York

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike finds a fifty-six year old Citroen 2CV retired in the sunny south of France. However, with age come problems. Edd must fire life into the smoky old engine.

programme.title: Shed & Buried
programme.desc: Series in which Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove nose around people's sheds and garages in search or automotive bargains. Today, in a Cornish surf shack they find a bevy of custom bikes, surf buggies and weird and wonderful objects of all kinds. In Oxfordshire, discoveries include rare motoring memorabilia,1970s kitsch and a fabulous collection of stationary engines. They come, they see, they haggle, they repair and finally sell for a tidy profit.

programme.title: Shed & Buried
programme.desc: Series in which Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove nose around people's sheds and garages in search or automotive bargains. Today, Henry and Sam discover a collection of motorbikes on Bodmin Moor accumulated over 25 years. They snap up a Suzuki B120 but selling it on to Henry's mate means they hardly make any money on it. Later, in Redruth, the pair come across Harry Potter's Ford Anglia. They bid for it and take it home where a buyer is not far away - their soundman Tommy wants it.

programme.title: Shed & Buried
programme.desc: Henry Cole and friends Fuzz Townshend and Guy Willison hit the road to find, buy and make a profit from the UK's abandoned automotive gems.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Auctioneer Angus Ashworth and his team are called out to people's homes with a mission to sift through a lifetime of possessions and find forgotten treasures that can be sold at auction.

programme.desc: Hundreds of cameras capture a rare tornado outbreak in 2023 as it struck Rolling Fork, Mississippi and Little Rock, Arkansas; when a twister hits Lewistown, Illinois, a group of tornado spotters find themselves trapped in the eye of the deadly storm.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Upholster Sonnaz Nooranvary and metal expert Dominic Chinea join forces to revive a Victorian iron rocking chair that has given great comfort to a family for generations. Mechanically minded David Burville takes on the fix of a quirky mechanical bear ornament.

programme.sub-title: Decorations on Mardi Gras Floats; Rock Candy

Mechanically minded David Burville takes on the fix of a quirky mechanical bear ornament.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.sub-title: Decorations on Mardi Gras Floats; Rock Candy
programme.desc: How do they build a float for New Orleans Mardi Gras parades? Plus, how do they stir, stretch and pull sugar to make rock candy?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: The miraculous feats of engineering that underpin our lives, from the most basic of everyday objects to the biggest and most complex. This episode focuses on crash helmets, rubber, and wave piercing.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they make wood burning stoves that bring warmth to the bleak Norwegian winter? Plus, how do build the synthesiser that changed music forever?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they assemble the reinvented Morgan 3 Wheeler? Plus, how do they protect firefighters' hands from heat, flame and chemical attack?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Some say it is the Porsche 911's ugly sibling but the 1970 VW Fastback type 3 has character. Mike finds one but it suffers from oil leaks, tatty interior, and rust.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike locates a long wheelbase '71 Chevy C10 truck. It is in great condition, but he feels they could maximise their profit if they can make it more drivable.

programme.title: Shed & Buried
programme.desc: The boys are back in town and travelling to Redruth, where they're confronted with Roy's sheds and their ramshackle contents. There's everything from a model canary-yellow Lamborghini to Harry Potter's Anglia!

programme.title: Shed & Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Sam visit two amazing sets of sheds in Hampshire, where they find plenty of Japanese bikes - but they come away with a real surprise. Selling their projects on, however, proves to be a real challenge.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Follow the amazing manufacturing processes behind miniature furniture, garden steam locomotives, hovercraft and folding bicycles.

programme.title: How It's Made

programme.desc: Amanda Perrault's dream move to a lake house with her husband and his young daughter turns into a nightmare; a campaign of abuse, and terrifying home invasions, leads to murder; a Sheriff must outwit a calculating killer and bring justice.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: When transgender teen Sage Smith goes missing, the investigation turns up evidence that forces detectives to look closer into Sage's inner circle.

programme.desc: US Air Force sergeant Nathan Paet and his family appear to live a blissfully normal life, until a horrific attack leads to their destruction.

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: The Cinema List: Remakes
programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of 'The Cinema List'. From 'Footloose' to 'The Italian Job', revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Thriller set at the Stanley Cup ice hockey finals. It's Game 7 and the winner will lift the trophy but with the Vice President attending, criminal Joshua Foss has his eyes on a bigger prize. Holding the VP hostage, his demands are backed up by the shooting of selected hostages and the threat of bombs planted around the stadium. However, rink security guard McCord, whose kids are in the crowd, refuses to be cowed.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Remakes
programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of 'The Cinema List'. From 'Footloose' to 'The Italian Job', revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: After coming out of self-imposed exile, daredevil operative Xander Cage must race against time to recover a sinister weapon known as Pandora's Box, a device that controls every military satellite in the world. Recruiting a new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself entangled in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of government.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Five assassins find themselves on a fast moving bullet train from Tokyo to Morioka with only a few stops in between. They discover their missions are not unrelated to each other.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: London undergoes a citywide evacuation when a World War II bomb is unearthed at a construction site. Amid the escalating chaos, a daring criminal operation is set in motion -- one that uses the evacuation as a cover for a meticulously planned heist.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: An elite policeman is demoted after refusing to work against his partner. He joins the Los Angeles SWAT team, who are assigned to guard a narcotics kingpin on his way to jail, but the druglord has offered $100 million to anyone who can rescue him.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: Nobody 2
programme.desc: Workaholic assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday to the small tourist town of Plummerville. However, he soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a corrupt theme-park operator, a shady sheriff, and a bloodthirsty crime boss.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Desperate for money to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards joins the top-rated show on television, "The Running Man," a deadly competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The emergence of a powerful new villain and the return of an old friend bring Peter Parker to the realization that all his enemies have one thing in common: Oscorp. Based on Marvel Comics characters.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Lucius must enter the Colosseum after the powerful emperors of Rome conquer his home. With rage in his heart and the future of the empire at stake, he looks to the past to find the strength and honour needed to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: A massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving it disabled and trapping the crew at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean. With time running out, rescue diver Jonas Taylor must save the crew and the ocean itself from an unimaginable threat: a 75-foot-long prehistoric shark known as the megalodon.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd
programme.desc: A grant-greedy principal puts two clueless teens in a bogus class for students with special needs.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winner's podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesn't last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Home Delivery
programme.desc: A plus-size supermodel invites her family over to experience the birth of her first child. (2025, 90 mins)

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Jim and Michelle are getting married and Jim struggles to win over his future in-laws and deal with his embarrassing dad. Meanwhile, Stifler isn't invited to the ceremony, but he's determined not to be left out.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. They're led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Frank's ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: American Pie: Reunion
programme.desc: Outrageous antics ensue when Jim, Michelle, Stifler and the gang get back together for their 13-year high school reunion.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon soon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: When a new student joins her college's female a cappella group, she takes the women out of their comfort zone of traditional pieces and introduces them to innovative arrangements.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he won't let her go that easily.

programme.title: About Last Night ...
programme.desc: Two Chicago singles try to build a more meaningful relationship with each other following a one-night stand.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: After a one-night stand, a couple decide to get married. However, it turns out to be a rocky road when both parties have to compromise their own cultural traditions.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: After a one-night stand, a couple decide to get married. However, it turns out to be a rocky road when both parties have to compromise their own cultural traditions.

programme.title: Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: When a perfect night with a perfect stranger ends suddenly the next morning, Charlotte searches for answers and meaning in her life. However, she soon uncovers a shocking secret that changes everything she knows about the man who captured her heart.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: A surgeon allows her young colleague to take charge during a surgery. When a mistake occurs, the surgeon finds herself in a difficult situation.

programme.title: Birdy
programme.desc: A soldier returns from Vietnam to find his boyhood friend, also a fellow soldier, in a military hospital, having suffered a mental breakdown in which he has become detached from reality and imagines that he is a bird.

programme.title: I'll Be Right There
programme.desc: A woman navigates the challenges of her pregnant daughter's wedding plans, her mother's health concerns, her son's uncertain future, and her own romantic dilemmas.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of paranoia, surviving off-grid with his daughter, Willa. When his nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her while battling the consequences of his past.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: Following a man's bid for survival on a desert island following a plane crash. An employee of Fedex snatches a few days between flights with his loving family and fiancée, to whom he proposes, before rushing off on his next assignment. However, his plane crashes during a storm and over the next four years he must train himself to survive away from civilisation.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: After discovering that he can travel through time, a young man uses his ability to win the woman of his dreams and save his friend from professional disaster.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this film, set during World War II, tells the story of the all-female baseball league that was started while the American men were away fighting in Europe. After a team of potential players has been recruited, former player Jimmy Dugan coaches the girls and prepares them for the World Series.

programme.title: Molly's Game
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defence lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: I'll Be Right There
programme.desc: A woman navigates the challenges of her pregnant daughter's wedding plans, her mother's health concerns, her son's uncertain future, and her own romantic dilemmas.

programme.title: The Tuxedo
programme.desc: An ordinary cabbie uses gadget-laden formal wear to combat a villain who wants to poison the world's water supply.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Buffalo Kids
programme.desc: Arriving in New York City in 1886, two orphaned Irish siblings embark on a wild cross-country journey aboard a transcontinental train. They make a new friend and encounter heroes and villains in their quest to find a new home.

programme.title: Open Season 2
programme.desc: Elliot's way to his wedding with Giselle gets longer when Mr Weenie is kidnapped by a group of pampered pets determined to return him to his owners.

programme.title: Open Season 3
programme.desc: After Boog switches places with a circus bear, Elliott and the gang must rescue him before the circus returns home to Russia.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: Award-winning DreamWorks animation from the Aardman team, telling the story of a band of chickens doomed to a life of egg-laying on a Yorkshire chicken farm. When a flamboyant American rooster arrives on the scene, the hens hope he can teach them to fly to freedom. However, when a chicken-pie making machine is installed, their need becomes urgent and they must devise other means of escape.

programme.title: Pokémon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: A young man joins forces with Detective Pikachu to unravel the mystery behind his father's disappearance. Chasing clues through the streets of Ryme City, the dynamic duo soon discover a devious plot that poses a threat to the Pokémon universe.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit in The Curse of the Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: The village is being overrun by rabbits and Wallace has a plan to alter their minds so that they will leave the vegetable allotments alone. However, his plan goes awry and the rabbit problem escalates when the villagers discover a monstrous `were-rabbit' destroying everything in its sights. Will Wallace and Gromit be able to solve the conundrum before the creature gets shot?

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2
programme.desc: Despite his efforts, Peter can't seem to shake his reputation for mischief among the other rabbits. Once he adventures out of the garden Peter finds himself in a world where mischief is appreciated, but soon his family come to bring him home.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: Ever since her parents left her as a baby, little Annie has led a hard-knock life with her mean foster-mother, Miss Hannigan. However, that all changes when hard-nosed billionaire and mayor candidate Will Stacks takes her in on the recommendation of his advisers. Stacks believes that he's Annie's guardian angel, but the plucky youngster's confidence and sunny outlook may mean that Annie will save Will instead.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and his adopted family, the Browns, decide to visit his aunt Lucy in Peru, but circumstances lead them towards misadventures in the Amazon rainforest and mountains of Peru.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles and Tails reunite to battle Shadow, a mysterious new enemy with powers unlike anything they've faced before. With their abilities outmatched in every way, they seek out an unlikely alliance to stop Shadow and protect the planet.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: Ever since her parents left her as a baby, little Annie has led a hard-knock life with her mean foster-mother, Miss Hannigan. However, that all changes when hard-nosed billionaire and mayor candidate Will Stacks takes her in on the recommendation of his advisers. Stacks believes that he's Annie's guardian angel, but the plucky youngster's confidence and sunny outlook may mean that Annie will save Will instead.

programme.title: The Portable Door
programme.desc: A man lands an internship at a mysterious London firm with unconventional employees, including the charismatic CEO who is incorporating modern corporate strategy into ancient magical practices.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A heart-warming tale about a troubled young boy and his friendship with a captive orca whale named Willy. On bad terms with his new foster parents and set to work in an aquarium under court order, the boy turns to the whale for companionship. When he uncovers a cruel plot by its owner to kill the whale in order to claim a big insurance payout, the lad becomes determined to save Willy's life and release him back into the wild.

programme.title: Free Willy

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: Slapstick tale which follows the misfortunes of two hard-up brothers whose plans to renovate and sell a valuable building are jeopardised by a rogue mouse. The brothers soon find themselves pulling out all the stops in order to evict their tiny resident.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: Soviet and American forces give chase when the captain of a Soviet nuclear submarine sets a course for the Maine coast.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Richard Kemble's wife is murdered and he is arrested for the crime. He soon realises he has been framed, and while being transported on a prison bus, he manages to escape. On the run, he has to evade the relentless pursuit by the US Marshall, Samuel Gerard, while also avoiding everyone he knows, and finding out who the real killer is, the one-armed man who broke into their house.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A recently engaged woman becomes obsessed with meeting the grieving widower she heard on a late night radio show. Sam, the widower, receives hundreds of letters following the radio phone-in which was instigated by his son Jonah.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: A violent and uncompromising police officer hunts for a psychopath who holds the city of San Francisco to ransom. Although the officer's unorthodox methods do not endear him to his superiors, the mayor reluctantly agrees that Harry Callahan seems to be the right cop for the job.

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A desperate and crazed man, with the help of an accomplice, takes a local Brooklyn bank hostage with plans to rob it in order to pay for his lover's sex-change operation.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: Soviet and American forces give chase when the captain of a Soviet nuclear submarine sets a course for the Maine coast.

programme.title: Batman Returns

Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batman's efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: Effects-laden blockbuster about a huge reptile which emerges from the sea to wreak havoc in Manhattan. On a research trip to Chernobyl, a young scientist discovers a startling link between genetic mutation and radioactivity. When a fishing trawler is attacked by an unseen creature, and other evidence of a massive reptilian creature is unearthed, he realises that the creature is following a destructive path to New York.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: DA Harvey Dent and vengeful scientist The Riddler plan to take down Batman, as Dent wrongly believes that it is Batman's fault he was disfigured, and the scientist is angry with Bruce Wayne for rejecting his experiments. The Gotham City superhero is going to need his new partner, boy wonder Robin, but will he be able to cope with the distraction of sexy doctor Chase Meridian?

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: When ex-German international and camp commandant Van Steiner suggests a match between the POWs and the Germans, it swiftly escalates into a propaganda exercise.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A glamorous career woman loses control when her married lover, a Manhattan attorney, ends their brief affair. Unable to accept his rejection, she pursues him at the office, and then at his home, eventually drawing his wife and daughter into the confrontation.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.desc: Korpi dismantles the house where his family was murdered and loads it on a truck to rebuild it somewhere safe. He soon finds himself in a violent cross-country chase as the Red Army commander who killed his family comes back to finish the job.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: `Class Clown' Valentino is busy showing off, and the staff decide that `Big Boy' Beni needs to lose weight. Teenage mum Clara and her baby Clarita face a return to island life and they welcome a new pupil: Alba, the only reported albino orangutan.

programme.title: Valley of Flood and Fire
programme.desc: It's the end of November in the Luangwa Valley, and the rains have just begun. It marks the end of one of the toughest dry season on record, and triggers a transition from parched wilderness to luscious wetland.

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: Living on the southwestern tip of Africa is an unusual colony of African penguins. Most African penguins prefer to breed on off-shore islands in the region, but human interference on their island homes has caused many birds to look elsewhere.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: There's a tasty treat of corn for the chimps but Bart and his troop miss out and the new lemur boys get to experience life in the trees at Malagasy.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Orangutan Amy becomes a great-grandmother as Awan and Jin welcome a baby boy. While there's more baby news for the newly released doucs and gibbons in Vietnam.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Vet Arga rescues an orphaned one-year-old orangutan with a broken wrist. Meanwhile, Beni attempts Jungle School's biggest ever banana heist and five adult orangutans are released into the wild.

programme.desc: As the dry season begins, thousands of animals are making their way to the Acacia Loop. Each must establish their place in the pecking order and avoid the dangerous residents who are all too willing to make a meal of the unwary.

programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.desc: As temperatures soar, lagoons and waterholes are drying up. This forces Mvula and his family to undertake a long and dangerous journey to the only remaining source of water, the Luangwa River.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding, Derek Acorah and a team of paranormal experts visit West Wycombe Caves, home of the notorious Hell Fire Club, which organised satanic rituals and orgies. A girl died there after a cruel joke went wrong and is said wander the caves in a Victorian wedding dress.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit Mary Kings Close, a 17th-century building built over the top of older streets and houses. Many of its residents died of the plague and a fire raged in 1750 - a child's head, a severed arm and a little girl in a blue dress are just some of the apparitions reported.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: A warm welcome awaits the team across the Irish Sea, but as night falls and the lights go out at Kinnitty Castle, a series of startling and eerie events shake and scare every screaming member of the crew one by one.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: For centuries, Castle Leslie has been a family home. Who still haunts it, and why won't they leave? As they attempt to make contact, the `Most Haunted' team are shocked and amazed at the response they receive from beyond the grave.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay stumbles onto a new, potent source of energy for Atlantis, based on Ancient technology, but it's yet to be perfected.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: A golfer is brutally attacked and Cutter and his team fear that an aerial predator is at large. The pressure is on to find the perpetrator, but when they make the wrong call, Cutter and Claudia discover that they could be the next victims.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Cutter and the team are faced with their deadliest threat yet - a quick, ruthless predator with seemingly supernatural powers. The team travel back in time through the reopened anomaly in the Forest of Dean with far-reaching consequences.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding, Derek Acorah and a team of paranormal experts spend 24 hours in the Wellington Hotel, which was originally a 17th century coaching inn and is supposedly haunted by Thomas Hardy as well as many other ghosts.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding, Derek Acorah and the team visit the Guild Hall in Leicester, which has had many uses over the years - including a police headquarters, a town hall and a school - and as a result is haunted by a wide range of spirits.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and spirit medium Derek Acorah conduct more chilling paranormal investigations. On their first investigation in the Netherlands, the `Most Haunted' team encounter suicide and torture. Who are these unfortunate victims? Which shocked member of the team will they choose to use, in order to make their suffering known?

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team conclude their investigations in the Netherlands by visiting a remote castle with a history of family turmoil and medieval torture. Which ghosts from the castle's weary past will make it a night to forget?

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rare Honda S800 sports car from 1967 takes Derek's fancy, and a couple of very different Ford Capris with long histories go head-to-head at the auction.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewsons sell a 1958 Bedford D122 and a 1969 Vanden Plas Princess. They also meet a collector who may be willing to finally part with his huge hot hatch collection.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: There is a triple collection of desirable cars in store for Derek when an MG Midget, an Austin-Healey frogeye Sprite and an RS2000 come up for auction.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave's son Jack is heading out to Cheshire to collect two cars with a 35-year age difference. And luckily for Mathewsons, Lucy knows exactly what has been brought in for auction.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: The newest, biggest boat in the fleet, the Chris Andra, sets off on her maiden voyage, but the hunt for a shoal of migrating mackerel is far from plain sailing for skipper Willie Tait and his co-skipper and cousin, Peter. Meanwhile, on the trawler Renown skipper James Buchan is practising a form of fishing dating back almost 200 years.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Lifelong friends and skippers, Jimmy Buchan and Sandy Watt, take stock of the human cost of one of the most dangerous occupations known to mankind. As Jimmy's trawler Amity lands a hefty catch of prawns, he comes to terms with his fears for the safety of his own life and those of his crew. Meanwhile, Sandy's young apprentice John Duncan Campbell gets the chance he's been waiting for.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Faced with ominous weather warnings, Sandy Watt must decide whether to brave violent storms or head for the safety of the harbour. Two much larger boats, the trawlers Starlight and Starlight Rays, hunt as a pair. Their skippers and crews must have complete trust in each other's skill and judgement - when casting their nets on perilous seas the trawlers come within a stone's throw of each other.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: As the net closes upon Berlin, Hitler retreats to an underground bunker and with his officers faces the end of the Reich.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Japan had entered the war confident that superior spiritual strength and discipline would prevail. By 1944, they were fighting for survival, crippled by shortages of food, metals and fuel. After massive defeats at Saipan, Iwo Jima and Okinawa, a continuous campaign of Allied bombing kills 250,000 and leaves eight million homeless.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Ferocious fighting characterises the Allied offensive in the Pacific. The Japanese are fanatical in defence and severe casualties are incurred by the Americans as they embark on a two-pronged attack.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Looking at the Allied scientists' attempts to develop a new, immensely powerful weapon, and debating the moral implications of its use. Narrated by Laurence Olivier.

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy is stressed, as she has to make an important speech at a recruitment conference and has nobody to help her write it. Sensing an opportunity to impress her, Lee offers his services, which upsets Tim, who also thinks he is the best man for the job. What started off as a small job soon turns into a competition between Tim and Lee.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The crew awakens to find their memories of the last four days have been erased.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister decides to read Rimmer's diary and discovers a leak from the `Stasis' (suspended-animation chamber) that creates a doorway to the past. Passing through the leak, the crew are able to go back in time to a point before the rest of the crew were wiped out and might just be able to bring someone back with them.

programme.desc: To celebrate their forthcoming 40th wedding anniversary, Marlene has arranged for her and Boycie to renew their marriage vows, but, whilst checking up on old friends and acquaintances for the guest list, she hears some devastating news - news that puts an entirely different complexion the Boyces' relationship.

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Kate and Lee are forced to take in a lodger - a surly 14-year-old boy Nicky. Lee's attempts to bond with the teenager prove less than successful, while Tim and Nicky discover they have quite a lot in common. Meanwhile, Kate tries to persuade a carnivorous Great Dane to become a vegetarian with unfortunate results.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Holly's increasingly erratic behaviour endangers Lister and the ship, and backup computer Queeg 500 is brought in to replace him, relegating Holly to the role of night watchman. Unfortunately, Queeg has peculiarities all of his own, so the crew end up challenging Holly to take him on. Queeg chooses a game of chess and the loser faces deletion.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Holly devises a faster-than-light drive known as the `Holly Hop Drive' which can transport the Red Dwarf anywhere in the universe in a microsecond. As you can expect it all goes wrong and the crew are transported to a parallel universe where they meet duplicates of themselves, only with differences as they soon find out.

programme.desc: Another batch of splendid sketches. Here, Lee and Lance do a kitchen refit, and the gasman visits the Lovely Wobbly Randy Old Ladies. With special guests Des Lynam and Jimmy Hill.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Claustrophobic prison cells that contain a story worthy of international acclaim, and a vast mountainside complex that held the power to change the world.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Smoke & Steel

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.desc: The team head to Manchester to help renovate the damp and unsafe home of Rebecca and Steve and their triplets.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Homeowners across Britain try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. That's where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in. They help homeowners complete their DIY projects gone awry.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Four years ago June Finlay suffered a terrible brain infection which has left her unable to walk, talk and totally dependent on her devoted husband John. Nick and the DIY SOS team extend the house and give June back her dignity.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Watchdog's Nikki Fox and Matt Allwright take to the antiques trail in the Kent countryside. For good measure and expert guidance, our venerable journalists are accompanied by veteran Road Trippers Natasha Raskin Sharp and David Harper.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Celebrated radio broadcasters and good mates Mark Radcliffe and Edith Bowman put down their mics and battle it out to pick up some profit-making collectables and curios. Antiques experts Paul Martin and Natasha Raskin Sharp are along for the ride.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: The nation's favourite vet returns with more cutting-edge care. In this rescue special, we meet abandoned seven-week-old kitten Pretzel and look back at Wobble the whippet.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats tea-drinking Bedlington terrier Muffin, who has a fractured leg due to her limb deformity, and fox red Labrador Jethro, whose arthritic elbows are stopping him from walking properly.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: The team head to Manchester to help renovate the damp and unsafe home of Rebecca and Steve and their triplets.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.sub-title: Terri, Esme and the Chi Family
programme.desc: Pete meets the four-legged friends that call the UK's leading dog welfare charity, Dogs Trust, home. From when they are rescued, Pete plays an instrumental role in their rehabilitation process, right up until the point the dogs are safely rehomed.

programme.title: Shades of Blue
programme.desc: Harlee refuses to hand over incriminating evidence against Wozniak to Stahl, bit instead gives him a resolved unofficial investigation that Espada and Tess initiated.

programme.sub-title: Who Is It That Can Tell Me Who I Am

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machine's £10,000 jackpot.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team renovate the house of Colin and Clare Gibbons and adapt it to meet the needs of their eldest son Christopher, who suffers from Duchene's muscular dystrophy.

programme.desc: Comedian and actress Lucy Porter is joined by close friend, professional brainiac and feared Chaser Jenny Ryan. They're hunting for antiques across south Wales, ably assisted by experts Serhat Ahmet and Steven Moore.

programme.desc: Gareth Malone and YolanDa Brown visit Edinburgh and Fife. This pitch-perfect duo is gunning around town in a 1960s motor, each with £400 to buy antiques that will hopefully ring up some big profits at auction.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel gives Maine coon cat Lexie a bilateral total hip replacement, while one-year-old bouncy Border terrier Charlie is in pain and is struggling to walk, and dwarf rabbit Locky has broken his leg.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: We meet adventurous cat Oz, who dramatically broke his ankle falling from a significant height; Ollie, an eight-month-old Labrador puppy, is rushed to Fitzpatrick's as a late-night emergency after being hit by a car.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.sub-title: Hugo and The Ice Cream Pups
programme.desc: Pete meets some newborn pups fighting to survive, and helps teach Hugo, a Cane Corso rescued from quarantine at Dover, how to be a dog.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick and the team head to Warrington help adapt the home of Dave McCartney, who suffered a massive stroke and is now forced to sleep in a hospital bed in the kitchen.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick and the team help renovate the home of Jason and Effie Sulong. Jason was left paralysed by a motorcycle accident and cardiac nurse Effie is struggling to look after Jason and their two kids in an ill-equipped home.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comedian and actress Lucy Porter is joined by close friend, professional brainiac and feared Chaser Jenny Ryan. They're hunting for antiques across south Wales, ably assisted by experts Serhat Ahmet and Steven Moore.

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous
programme.desc: Patsy and Edina bully Saffy into allowing them to care for baby Jane for the day. While Saffy and John spend a romantic day together, Patsy and Edina take the baby out for a glamorous photo shoot.

programme.title: Miranda
programme.sub-title: Special Xmas 2014 - I Do, But To Who?
programme.desc: We find Miranda where we left her, with two proposals - one from Gary and one from Mike. Will she choose one of them or will she run away from the pressures of relationships and the fear of not coping with being a wife?

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: It's the final chance for Miranda to try to learn to accept herself and find contentment. Will it be alone or does she find her one true love? One last chance to hang out with Miranda, Stevie, Penny, Tilly and Gary.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: From racing a motorbike at altitude to trying to break the speed record for a hovercraft, Guy wants to find out what makes things go fast by getting his hands dirty in a range of unique engineering projects.

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: Guy visits the USA, where he hopes to win at one of America's oldest races: the Pike's Peak International Hill Climb. Riders compete against the clock on a gruelling mountainside track that finishes over 4000 metres above sea level.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: This week at the Mathewsons', there is a 1982 Audi Quattro and a Sunbeam Alpine. Plus, Derek takes delivery of a beautiful green Renault van, previously used as a bread van in Paris.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Scotland in the mother of all rainstorms to pick up a Jaguar E-type and a rare MGC convertible. Plus, Dave extracts a rare Austin Gipsey from a lock up.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Despite having the largest pre-war European army, France's outdated forces were humiliated by the Germans. Identifying a weakness in the Maginot Line, a defensive border which ran along the north east of France but did not extend to the channel in the west, German air and armour power simply skirted the line in the north and forged south.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A secret weapons programme in the heart of Austria that could have ended badly for the Allies - and may have indicated nuclear plans being concocted by Hitler.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team pore over more prized possessions. The experts are intrigued by a rare glass vase, items from Rudolf Hess's plane and Michael Jackson's hat.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are at the Steam Museum in Swindon, where objects attracting the experts' eyes include one of the rarest pieces of silver even seen on the show, a valuable painting, and a small ring that holds a big surprise for one owner. Fans of bizarre collections will also enjoy some choice pickings, including uneaten slices of royal wedding cakes dating back from Queen Victoria's day.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek has sold everything from trucks to bicycles - but he can't remember the last time he auctioned off a two-seater plane.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: 100 motorbikes come in for auction from every era of the 20th century. Also, the team assess a 1965 Vanden Plas Princess with a four litre Rolls Royce engine that's seen better days.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The A4 LNER Pacific Locomotive Sir Nigel Gresley must be hauled 46 miles at 30mph from Crewe to Bridgnorth.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: Asia is the largest and most extreme continent on our planet, stretching from the Arctic Circle in the north to the tropical forests on the equator. The animals here face the hottest deserts, tallest jungles and highest mountains found anywhere on Earth. But the continent has not always looked like this. These extreme worlds were created when India collided with the rest of Asia 30 million years ago, shaping the continent as we know it today.

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: Guy leaves his comfort zone as he takes to the water in a bid to set a new world speed record for a hovercraft. These machines float on a cushion of air and are notoriously difficult to control.

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: Guy takes on the challenge of building the fastest soapbox racer the world has ever seen, in an attempt to set a new speed record using just the pull of gravity and a tarmac road.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: There's a surprise waiting for Derek in Hull - a MGSA sports car that once had a tree growing through it. Plus, in North Wales, Alan Holmes is selling his son's Ford Escort RS 1600i.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up a rare Ford Zodiac Farnham Estate, while Dave heads for an isolated tent in the Midlands to collect a Triumph Toledo.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: With France fallen, the USA as yet uninvolved and the Russian pact with Hitler still in force, Britain stands all alone against the Germans forces across the English Channel.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Guided missiles, the Wasserfall, and the war-changing V2 were dreamed up and tested in Peenemunde, a German seaside city suddenly overtaken by Nazi elite.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Brighton, where large crowds have unearthed their family treasures for valuation. Amongst the pieces under the experts' eyes are a Trafalgar medal awarded to a boy sailor who witnessed the epic battle in 1805 at the tender age of thirteen; one of the largest, rarest and most valuable pieces of Clarice Cliff pottery ever seen on the programme.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A return visit to Brighton College where many hundreds gathered to welcome Fiona Bruce and the team of experts recently. Amongst the objects brought to the cameras are a valuable cup and saucer bought at a boot sale, a portrait of a pig by a famous artist, and surprise treasures found in a safe once owned by Agatha Christie.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rusty 1970 Fiat 500 goes under the hammer - Derek reckons it's the kind of vehicle that is so iconic that it has to be saved.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Tucked away in the showroom is a WW2-era Willys Jeep. Its original condition means there might be a bunfight for a military vehicle that's ripe for restoration.
